Title: Successful Sign Up
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Sign Up page
2. Enter a valid email address
3. Enter a valid password
4. Enter a valid name
5. Click the Sign Up button
Expected Result: User is successfully created and logged in

Title: Invalid Email Format
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Sign Up page
2. Enter an invalid email address
3. Enter a valid password
4. Enter a valid name
5. Click the Sign Up button
Expected Result: Error message is displayed, and user is not created

Title: Empty Fields
Test Data: Empty email, password, and name fields
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Sign Up page
2. Leave all fields empty
3. Click the Sign Up button
Expected Result: Error message is displayed, and user is not created

Title: Successful Login
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Login page
2. Enter a valid email address
3. Enter a valid password
4. Click the Login button
Expected Result: User is successfully logged in

Title: Incorrect Password
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Login page
2. Enter a valid email address
3. Enter an incorrect password
4. Click the Login button
Expected Result: Error message is displayed, and user is not logged in

Title: Empty Fields
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Login page
2. Leave both fields empty
3. Click the Login button
Expected Result: Error message is displayed, and user is not logged in

Title: Successful Announcement Creation
Test Data: Valid title, description, location, and price
Test Steps:
1. User logs in
2. User navigates to the Create Announcement page
3. User enters a valid title
4. User enters a valid description
5. User enters a valid location
6. User enters a valid price
7. User clicks the Create Announcement button
Expected Result: Announcement is successfully created and displayed

Title: Invalid Title
Test Data: Invalid title (e.g., empty or too long)
Test Steps:
1. User logs in
2. User navigates to the Create Announcement page
3. User enters an invalid title
4. User enters a valid description
5. User enters a valid location
6. User enters a valid price
7. User clicks the Create Announcement button
Expected Result: Error message is displayed, and announcement is not created

Title: Invalid Description
Test Data: Invalid description (e.g., empty or too long)
Test Steps:
1. User logs in
2. User navigates to the Create Announcement page
3. User enters a valid title
4. User enters an invalid description
5. User enters a valid location
6. User enters a valid price
7. User clicks the Create Announcement button
Expected Result: Error message is displayed, and announcement is not created

Title: Invalid Location
Test Data: Invalid location (e.g., empty or not a valid geographical location)
Test Steps:
1. User logs in
2. User navigates to the Create Announcement page
3. User enters a valid title
4. User enters a valid description
5. User enters an invalid location
6. User enters a valid price
7. User clicks the Create Announcement button
Expected Result: Error message is displayed, and announcement is not created

Title: Invalid Price
Test Data: Invalid price (e.g., negative or too high)
Test Steps:
1. User logs in
2. User navigates to the Create Announcement page
3. User enters a valid title
4. User enters a valid description
5. User enters a valid location
6. User enters an invalid price
7. User clicks the Create Announcement button
Expected Result: Error message is displayed, and announcement is not created

Title: Successful Announcement Reservation
Test Steps:
1. User logs in
2. User navigates to the Announcement page
3. User selects an available announcement
4. User enters a valid reservation date and time
5. User clicks the Reserve button
Expected Result: Announcement is successfully reserved, and user is notified

Title: Unavailable Announcement
Test Data: Announcement is not available (e.g., already reserved or expired)
Test Steps:
1. User logs in
2. User navigates to the Announcement page
3. User selects an unavailable announcement
4. User enters a valid reservation date and time
5. User clicks the Reserve button
Expected Result: Error message is displayed, and announcement is not reserved

Title: Empty Reservation Fields
Test Data: Empty reservation date and time fields
Test Steps:
1. User logs in
2. User navigates to the Announcement page
3. User selects an available announcement
4. User leaves both reservation fields empty
5. User clicks the Reserve button
Expected Result: Error message is displayed, and announcement is not reserved

Title: Successful Announcement Filtering
Test Steps:
1. User logs in
2. User navigates to the Announcement page
3. User applies valid filter criteria
Expected Result: Announcements matching the filter criteria are displayed

Title: Invalid Filter Criteria
Test Data: Invalid filter criteria (e.g., empty or invalid values)
Test Steps:
1. User logs in
2. User navigates to the Announcement page
3. User applies invalid filter criteria
Expected Result: Error message is displayed, and announcements are not filtered

Title: Successful Announcement Acceptance
Preconditions: User is logged in as an administrator
Test Steps:
1. User logs in as an administrator
2. User navigates to the Announcement page
3. User selects an announcement to accept
4. User clicks the Accept button
Expected Result: Announcement is successfully accepted, and user is notified

Title: Invalid Announcement to Accept
Preconditions: User is logged in as an administrator
Test Data: Announcement that cannot be accepted (e.g., already accepted or expired)
Test Steps:
1. User logs in as an administrator
2. User navigates to the Announcement page
3. User selects an announcement that cannot be accepted
4. User clicks the Accept button
Expected Result: Error message is displayed, and announcement is not accepted

Title: Empty Announcement Selection
Preconditions: User is logged in as an administrator
Test Steps:
1. User logs in as an administrator
2. User navigates to the Announcement page
3. User does not select any announcements
4. User clicks the Accept button
Expected Result: Error message is displayed, and no announcements are accepted

Title: Successful Viewing of Another User's Profile
Test Steps:
1. User logs in
2. User navigates to another user's profile page
Expected Result: User's profile is displayed

Title: Invalid User to View
Test Steps:
1. User logs in
2. User navigates to another user's profile page (invalid user)
Expected Result: Error message is displayed, and user's profile is not displayed
